11900.short_name: Abu Bakr bin Abi Musa al-Asha'ari
11900.full_name: Abu Bakr ('Amir/'Amr) bin Abi Musa bin Qays bin Saleem b. Hadar b. Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr
11900.arabic: أبو بكر بن أبى موسى الأشعري
11900.bio: Full Lineage: Abu Bakr bin Abi Musa ibn Qays bin Saleem bin Hadar bin Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr b. 'Amir b. 'Udar b. Wa'il b. Najia b. al-Jumahar b. Asha'r b. Udd

11901.short_name: Abu Barda bin Abi Musa al-Asha'ari
11901.full_name: Abu Barda(al-Harith) bin Abi Musa bin Qays bin Saleem b. Hadar b. Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr
11901.arabic: أبو بردة / الحارث بن أبي موسى الأشعري
11901.bio: Full Lineage: Abu Barda/al-Harith bin Abi Musa('Abdullah) ibn Qays bin Saleem bin Hadar bin Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr b. 'Amir b. 'Udar b. Wa'il b. Najia b. al-Jumahar b. Asha'r b. Udd

11902.full_name: Musa bin Abi Musa bin Qays bin Saleem b. Hadar b. Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr
11902.bio: Full Lineage: Musa bin Abi Musa('Abdullah) ibn Qays bin Saleem bin Hadar bin Harb b. 'Amir b. 'Unz b. Bakr b. 'Amir b. 'Udar b. Wa'il b. Najia b. al-Jumahar b. Asha'r b. Udd

11905.full_name: 'Umar bin Hafs bin 'Asim bin 'Umar bin al-Khattab
11905.arabic: عمر بن حفص بن عاصم بن عمر بن الخطاب

11949.full_name: Mu'awiya bin Yazid b. Mu'awiya b. Abu Sufyan b. Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
11949.bio: He was the 3rd Umayyad Caliph for short period in 64 AH.

11950.full_name: al-Walid bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11950.arabic: الوليد بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11950.mother_name: Umm al-Walid bint al-'Abbas bin Jaz
11950.bio: He was the 6th Umayyad Caliph from 86 AH(705 CE) to 96 AH (715 CE).

11951.full_name: Suliaman bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11951.arabic: سليمان بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11951.mother_name: Umm al-Walid bint al-'Abbas bin Jaz
11951.bio: He was 7th Caliph from 96 AH/715 CE to 98 AH/717 CE.

11952.full_name: Yazid bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11952.arabic: يزيد بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11952.bio: He was 9th Umayyad Caliph from 720 CE to 724 CE

11953.full_name: Hisham bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11953.arabic: هشام بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11953.mother_name: Umm al-Walid bint al-'Abbas bin Jaz
11953.bio: He was 10 th Umayyad Chalif for 20 years from 105 AH/724 CE to 125 AH/743 CE.

11956.full_name: al-Walid bin Yazid bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11956.arabic: الوليد بن يزيد بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11956.bio: He was 11th Umayyad Caliph from 125 AH/743 CE to 126 AH/744 CE

11957.full_name: Yazid bin al-Walid bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11957.arabic: يزيد بن الوليد بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11957.bio: He was the 12th Umayyad Caliph in 126 AH(744 CE) for 6 months.

11958.full_name: Ibrahim bin al-Walid bin 'Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
11958.arabic: ابراهيم بن الوليد بن عبد الملك بن مروان
11958.bio: He was the 13th Umayyad Caliph in 126 AH(744 CE) for short period.

11959.short_name: Marwan bin Muhammad bin Marwan al-Himar
11959.full_name: Marwan bin Muhammad bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
11959.arabic: مروان بن محمد بن مروان بن الحكم الحمار
11959.bio: He was the 14th and the last Umayyad Caliph from 126 AH/744 CE to 132 AH/750 CE.

11960.short_name: Marwan bin Muhammad bin Marwan al-Himar
11960.full_name: Marwan bin Muhammad bin Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-Aas b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
11960.arabic: مروان بن محمد بن مروان بن الحكم الحمار
11960.bio: He was the 14th and the last Umayyad Caliph from 126 AH/744 CE to 132 AH/750 CE.
